title: Mybench Ledger Entry
description: One append-only local ledger entry. Contains ONLY salted commitments, Merkle roots, and timestamps — never content, prompt text, code, or filenames.

schema_version.description: Schema version; bump on breaking changes.

entry_id.description: Opaque unique id for this entry.

commitment.description: H(nonce||len||content) as lowercase hex. Content is never stored.

merkle_root.description: Optional Merkle root this entry rolls up into.
